item.title: Sed
item.description:
sed

sedÔľöstream editor śĶĀÁľĖŤĺĎŚô® ÔľĆšłĽŤ¶ĀÁĒ®šļéśĖáśú¨Ś§ĄÁźÜ„Äā

sedŚĎĹšĽ§ś†ľŚľŹÔľö

sed   -options   ‚Äôexpression1;expression2‚Äô     file           śČßŤ°ĆŚ§öšł™ŚĎĹšĽ§
sed   -options   [-e ‚Äėexpression1‚Äô] [-e ‚Äėexpression2‚Äô]  file  śČßŤ°ĆŚ§öšł™ŚĎĹšĽ§
sed   -options   [-f   scriptfile]   file                     ťÄöŤŅáŤĄöśú¨śČßŤ°ĆŚĎĹšĽ§
sed   -options   [-f   scriptfile]   file  >  newfile  #sedšŅģśĒĻŚźéťáćŚģöŚźĎŚąįśĖįśĖášĽ∂„Äā

sedśĆášĽ§ťúÄŤ¶ĀÁĒ®ŚćēŚľēŚŹ∑ŚĆÖŚõī„ÄāšĹŅÁĒ®ŚŹĆŚľēŚŹ∑‚Äú‚ÄĚŚŹĮšĽ•šľ†ťÄíŚŹėťáŹ„Äā SedťĽėŤģ§ŚĻ∂ś≤°śúČšŅģśĒĻśĖášĽ∂filešł≠ÁöĄśēįśćģ„Äā sedťĽėŤģ§Śú®stdoutŤĺďŚáļśĖášĽ∂ÁöĄśČÄśúČŤ°Ć„Äā SedŚúįŚĚÄťúÄŤ¶ĀšĹŅÁĒ®/address/śĚ•ŚĆÖŚõī„Äā sedšĹŅÁĒ®ś≠£ŚąôŤ°®ŤĺĺŚľŹŚŹĮšĽ•ÁĒ®\BRE\ŚĆÖŚõīÔľĆŚ¶āśěúś®°ŚľŹŚĆÖŚźę/ÔľĆťā£šĻąŚŹĮšĽ•šĹŅÁĒ®ťô§šļÜśćĘŤ°ĆÁ¨¶šĻčŚ§ĖÁöĄśČÄśúČŚ≠óÁ¨¶ŚĆÖŚõī„Äā

optionsÔľö

-eÔľöśĆáŚģöŚ§öšł™ŚĎĹšĽ§śąĖŤĄöśú¨
-fÔľöśĆáŚģöśČßŤ°ĆŚĎĹšĽ§ÁöĄŤĄöśú¨
-nÔľöťėĽś≠ĘŤá™Śä®ŤĺďŚáļÔľĆpŚŹĮšĽ•śČďŚćįŚĆĻťÖćÁöĄŤ°Ć„Äā
-i: Áõīśé•šŅģśĒĻŤĮĽŚÖ•ÁöĄśĖášĽ∂ÁöĄŚÜÖŚģĻ.

experssionÔľö

expressionÔľöśĆášĽ§ÁĒĪś®°ŚľŹŚíĆŤŅáÁ®čÁĽĄśąź„Äā
[address]/[line-address][!]command[arguments]
[address]Ť°®Á§ļŚúįŚĚÄÔľĆšłÄŤą¨ÁĒ®ś®°ŚľŹŤŅõŤ°ĆŚĮĽŚĚÄÔľĆaddressÁľļÁúĀŤ°®Á§ļśēīšł™śĖášĽ∂ŚĮĽŚĚÄÔľĆšł§šł™ŚúįŚĚÄÁĒ®ÔľĆťöĒŚľÄ„Äā
[line-address]Ť°®Á§ļŚŹ™ŤÉĹśėĮšłÄšł™ŚúįŚĚÄ„Äā
[!] Ť°®Á§ļšłćŚĆĻťÖćŤĮ•ŚúįŚĚÄÁöĄśČÄśúČŤ°Ć

Command:

sedśúČ25šł™ŚĎĹšĽ§„Äā

šĹŅÁĒ®Ś§ßśč¨ŚŹ∑{}Śú®šłÄšł™ŚúįŚĚÄšł≠ŚĀöŚĶĆŚ•óśďćšĹúÔľöšĺčŚ¶āÔľö

/address1/,/address2/{
    /^$/d
    s/string1/string2/
    ‚Ä¶
}             // ŚćēÁč¨šłÄŤ°ĆÔľĆŚźéťĚĘšłćŤÉĹśúČÁ©ļś†ľ

sŚĎĹšĽ§ÔľöśõŅśćĘÔľĆśõŅśćĘś®°ŚľŹÁ©ļťóīšł≠ÁöĄŤ°Ć„Äā

sed '[address]s/oldpattern/newpattern/[flag]' filename

flag:

n:śõŅśćĘśĮŹšł™ŚĮĽŚĚÄŤ°ĆÁöĄÁ¨¨nšł™ŚĆĻťÖćś®°ŚľŹ„ÄāťĽėŤģ§n=1. nŚú®1-512šĻčťóī„Äā
g:śõŅśćĘśĮŹšł™ŚĮĽŚĚÄŤ°ĆÁöĄśČÄśúČŚĆĻťÖćś®°ŚľŹ„Äā
p:śČďŚćįś®°ŚľŹÁ©ļťóīÁöĄŚÜÖŚģĻ
w fileÔľöŚ¶āśěúŚŹĎÁĒüśõŅśćĘŚįĪŚįÜŤŅôšłÄŤ°ĆŚÜôŚÖ•file„ÄāŚŹ™ŚÜôŚÖ•śõŅśćĘÁöĄŤ°Ć,šłćŚÜôŚÖ•ŚÖ∂ŚģÉŤ°Ć.

ÁĒ®ŚŹćśĖúśĚ†\ŤĹ¨šĻČśćĘŤ°ĆÁ¨¶Ôľö

Śõ†šłļŚŹćśĖúśĚ†Śú®newpatternšł≠šĻüÁĒ®šļéŚĆÖŚźęśćĘŤ°ĆÁ¨¶„Äā

// ŚįÜŚĆĻťÖćÁöĄť°ĻśõŅśćĘśąźšł§šł™śćĘŤ°ĆÁ¨¶„Äā
sed '
s/pattern/\ (śćĘŤ°ĆÔľČ
\           ÔľąśćĘŤ°ĆÔľČ
string/' filename
Á≠ČšĽ∑šļéÔľö
sed 's/pattern/\n\n/' filename

ÁĒ®ŚŹćśĖúśĚ†\ŤĹ¨šĻČšłéÁ¨¶ŚŹ∑&Ôľö

// ÁĽďśěúśėĮÔľö string1 pattern string2 
sed 's/pattern/string1 & string2/g' filename

Ś¶āśěúšłćŤĹ¨šĻČ&ŚĆĻťÖćśēīšł™pattern:

// ÁĽďśěúśėĮÔľöstring1 & string2
sed 's/pattern/string1 \& string2/g' filename

ÁĒ®ŚŹćśĖúśĚ†\ŤĹ¨šĻČ\n:

// ŚįÜpatternšł≠ŚĆĻťÖćŚąįÁöĄÁ¨¨šłÄšł™Ś≠óšł≤ŚõěŤįÉŚąįnewpatternšł≠šĹŅÁĒ®„Äā
sed 's/pattern/\1/' filename

dŚĎĹšĽ§ÔľöŚą†ťô§ÔľĆŚą†ťô§ś®°ŚľŹÁ©ļťóīšł≠ÁöĄŤ°ĆÔľĆŚĻ∂šłćŚą†ťô§śĖášĽ∂šł≠ÁöĄŤ°Ć„Äā

'[address]d'
'1d' Śą†ťô§Á¨¨šłÄŤ°Ć
'$d' Śą†ťô§śúÄŚźéšłÄŤ°Ć
‚Äô/^$/d' Śą†ťô§Á©ļŤ°Ć
‚Äė/^\s\+$/d‚Äô  Śą†ťô§Á©ļÁôĹŤ°ĆÔľąś≤°śúČśēįŚ≠óŚ≠óÁ¨¶ÔľČ
‚Äė/^\s*$/d‚Äô Śą†ťô§Á©ļÁôĹŤ°ĆÔľąś≤°śúČśēįŚ≠óŚ≠óÁ¨¶ÔľČ

a/i/cŚĎĹšĽ§ÔľöŤŅĹŚä†/śŹíŚÖ•/śõīśĒĻ.

// Śú®ŚĆĻťÖćŚąįÁöĄŤ°ĆšłčťĚĘś∑ĽŚä†ŤŅĹŚä†ÁöĄŚÜÖŚģĻ
'[line-address]a string' filename
'[line-address]a\
string1\
string2\
string3' filename   ÔľąŤŅĹŚä†šłČŤ°ĆÔľČ

i:ŚźĆšłäÔľĆŚú®ŚĆĻťÖćŚąįÁöĄŤ°ĆšłäťĚĘśŹíŚÖ•ŚÜÖŚģĻ„Äā

// ŚįÜŚĆĻťÖćŚąįÁöĄŤ°ĆśõŅśćĘśéČ„Äā
'[address]c string' filename
'[address]c\
string1\
string2\
string3' filename

item.title: Nagios
item.description:
Nagios

Nagios is the industry standard in IT infrastructure monitoring

Nagios offers complete monitoring and alerting for servers, switches, applications, and services.

Nagios core:

Nagios Core is the monitoring and alerting engine that serves as the primary application around which hundreds of Nagios projects are built.

Nagios coreśėĮÁõĎśéßŚíĆŤ≠¶śä•ÁöĄšłĽŚľēśďéÔľĆŚõīÁĽēŚģÉŚĽļÁęčšļÜśąźŚćÉšłäšłáÁöĄť°ĻÁõģ„Äā śäÄśúĮś†ąśėĮcÔľĆŚŹ™ŤÉĹŚģČŤ£ÖŚú®linux/unixÁ≥ĽÁĽü„Äā Nagios coreŚŹ™śėĮšłÄšł™ÁõĎśéßŚ•óšĽ∂ÔľĆśú¨Ťļęś≤°śúČÁõĎśéßŚäüŤÉĹÔľĆťúÄŤ¶ĀśŹíšĽ∂śĚ•ŚģĆśąźÁõĎśéß„Äā

Nagios plugins:

Efficient, standalone extensions that provide low-level intelligence for monitoring anything and everything with Nagios Core.

Nagios coreÁöĄÁõĎśéßśŹíšĽ∂,šĻüŚįĪśėĮŚģėśĖĻśŹíšĽ∂,šłĽŤ¶ĀśėĮc„ÄĀshellŚíĆperl„Äā

graphite-web

A highly scalable real-time graphing system

carbon

Carbon is responsible for receiving metrics over the network, caching them in memory for “hot queries” from the Graphite-Web application, and persisting them to disk using the Whisper time-series library.

whisper/ceres

ceresšľöśõŅšĽ£whisper„Äā

Whisper is a fixed-size database, similar in design and purpose to RRD (round-robin-database). It provides fast, reliable storage of numeric data over time. Whisper allows for higher resolution (seconds per point) of recent data to degrade into lower resolutions for long-term retention of historical data.

grafana

Grafana is an open source, feature rich metrics dashboard and graph editor for Graphite, Elasticsearch, OpenTSDB, Prometheus and InfluxDB.

ŚÖ®ŚĪÄťÖćÁĹģśĖášĽ∂śėĮ<folder>/_config.yml

# Hexo Configuration

## Docs: https://hexo.io/docs/configuration.html

## Source: https://github.com/hexojs/hexo/

# Site

   title:

   subtitle:

   description:

   author:

   language: zh-Hans

   timezone: Asia/Shanghai

# URL

## If your site is put in a subdirectory, set url as ‘http://yoursite.com/child' and root as ‘/child/’

   url: http://<your-github-name>.github.io/

   root: /

   permalink: :year/:month/:day/:title/

   permalink_defaults:

# Directory

   source_dir: source

   public_dir: public

   tag_dir: tags

   archive_dir: archives

   category_dir: categories

   code_dir: downloads/code

   i18n_dir: :lang

   skip_render:

# Writing

   new_post_name: :title.md # File name of new posts

   default_layout: post # post | page | draft

   titlecase: false # Transform title into titlecase

   external_link: true # Open external links in new tab

   filename_case: 0

   render_drafts: false

   post_asset_folder: false

   relative_link: false

   future: true

   highlight:

   enable: true

   line_number: true

   auto_detect: true

   tab_replace: ''

# Category & Tag

   default_category: uncategorized

   category_map:

   tag_map:

# Date / Time format

## Hexo uses Moment.js to parse and display date

## You can customize the date format as defined in

## http://momentjs.com/docs/#/displaying/format/

   date_format: YYYY-MM-DD

   time_format: HH:mm:ss

# Pagination

## Set per_page to 0 to disable pagination

   per_page: 10

   pagination_dir: page

# Extensions

## Plugins: https://hexo.io/plugins/

## Themes: https://hexo.io/themes/

   theme: hexo-theme-canux

   Plugins:

   - hexo-deployer-git

# Extend plugins

## deploy

   deploy:

     type: git

     repo:

        github: https://github.com/crazy-canux/crazy-canux.github.io.git,master

        coding: https://git.coding.net/Canux/Canux.git,master

šłĽťĘėťÖćÁĹģ
